description_long: This internet cafe is a rectangular, single-story building with a flat, grid-patterned gray roof. The front facade features two rows of large, rectangular blue-tinted windows, suggesting a well-lit interior. One side of the building is painted a light purple, while the other sides are a neutral gray. There is a single door on the right side of the building, which appears to be open, providing access to the interior. The structure is simple and utilitarian, with no visible signage, advertisements, or decorative elements. The overall appearance is clean and modern, suitable for an urban environment.
description: A modern, rectangular internet cafe with a flat gray roof, blue-tinted windows, and a single open door. The building features a mix of gray and purple exterior walls.
description_view_0: A plain gray wall with a small protruding structure on the left side, no windows or doors visible.
description_view_1: The front of the building with two rows of large blue-tinted windows set in a gray wall, providing a clear view of the facade.
description_view_2: A solid purple wall with no windows or doors, giving a distinct color contrast to the other sides.
description_view_3: A gray wall with a single open door on the right side, suggesting the main entrance to the building.
